rationale: The cited paper studies bias mechanisms in online reviews (extremity driven by differential attrition), and the citing paper’s core design question is whether to base certification on consumer reports versus administrative metrics, so there is a plausible conceptual link. Given this sparse evidence, it cannot be safely dropped but is not strong enough to clearly keep.
